## Spec alignment

- [ ] Adds or extends one of the 14 spec-defined tools
- [ ] New tool (will require spec update)
- [ ] Pure docs / wiring / IaC (no surface change)

## Risk

- [ ] Touches signed decision shape (TrustVerdict / ReleaseDecision)
- [ ] Touches storage schema / SQLite migrations
- [ ] Touches MCP tool registry
- [ ] None of the above
